content:
# Session 48 (iter-048) ŌĆö Review Summary

## Metadata
- Iteration: 048. Lane: ROOT `TensorObjSubstrate.lean` SOLO `mathlib-build` escalation (HARD-STOP corrective).
- Sorry: root 0ŌåÆ0 (sorry-free, +2 decls); terminal `TensorObjInverse.lean` now RED (name collision, see below).
- Target attempted: `conjugateEquiv_restrictFunctorComp_inv` (the shared B2 + B1-crux keystone). **CLOSED.**
- Authoritative verification (this review, `lake build` ŌĆö NOT LSP):
  - `lake build AlgebraicJacobian.Picard.TensorObjSubstrate` ŌåÆ EXIT 0, 8321 jobs (root GREEN, sorry-free).
  - `#print axioms ŌĆ”conjugateEquiv_restrictFunctorComp_inv` ŌåÆ {propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound}, no sorryAx.
  - `lake build AlgebraicJacobian.Picard.TensorObjInverse` ŌåÆ **EXIT 1 (RED)** ŌĆö collision error at L216.

## Target: conjugateEquiv_restrictFunctorComp_inv ŌĆö SOLVED (root, public, axiom-clean)
Restrict-world mirror of Mathlib `conjugateEquiv_pullbackComp_inv`. Both B2
(`restrictFunctorIsoPullback_comp_compat`) and the B1-crux (`H1inv_app_eq_pullbackVal_restrict`) reduce to it.
iter-046 declared it "irreducible to library algebra" and HARD-STOPPED; iter-048 disproved that and closed it.

### Final proof structure (TensorObjSubstrate.lean L4943ŌĆō4968)
```
rw [show (restrictFunctorComp f g).hom
      = (Adjunction.leftAdjointCompIso (restrictAdjunction g) (restrictAdjunction f)
          (restrictAdjunction (f Ōē½ g)) (pushforwardComp f g)).inv from ?_]
┬Ę exact Adjunction.conjugateEquiv_leftAdjointCompIso_inv _ _ _ _      -- main goal
┬Ę ext M U : 3                                                          -- residual concrete iso-hom eq
  rw [restrictFunctorComp_hom_app_app]
  simp only [Adjunction.leftAdjointCompIso, conjugateIsoEquiv_symm_apply_inv, Iso.symm_inv,
    conjugateEquiv_symm_apply_app, Adjunction.comp_unit_app, Hom.comp_app,
    restrictFunctor_map_app', pushforwardComp_hom_app_app]
  erw [Hom.comp_app, restrictAdjunction_unit_app_app, pushforward_map_app,
    restrictAdjunction_unit_app_app, restrictAdjunction_counit_app_app]
  simp only [Functor.comp_obj, restrict_map]
  erw [Category.id_comp, ŌåÉ M.presheaf.map_comp, ŌåÉ M.presheaf.map_comp]
  all_goals first | rfl | (congr 1; exact Subsingleton.elim _ _)
```
Plus private helper `restrictFunctor_map_app'` (L4931): `((restrictFunctor f).map Žå).app U = Žå.app (f ''ßĄü U)` `:= rfl`.

### Key findings / patterns
- **DO NOT `ext` the conjugate-headed goal.** `ext M : 2` / `ext M U` on
  `conjugateEquiv ŌĆ” = pushforwardComp ŌĆ”` whnf-bombs the `SheafOfModules.pushforward` carrier diamond
  (root AND terminal, even at maxHeartbeats 1600000 + respectTransparency false). The prover confirmed
  this by isolated `lake env lean`. iter-046's failure was tactic ORDERING, not irreducibility.
- **Instantiate, don't equate.** `leftAdjointCompIso` is applied *to `pushforwardComp`*; the main goal
  then closes by the Mathlib lemma `Adjunction.conjugateEquiv_leftAdjointCompIso_inv` (CompositionIso.lean).
  This dodges the (genuinely circular) attempt to equate `restrictFunctorComp` with `leftAdjointCompIso`.
- **Sectionwise residual seams need `erw`, never `rw`.** `Hom.app (a Ōē½ b) V` (SheafOfModules `Ōē½`,
  defeq-not-syntactic) splits ONLY by `erw [Hom.comp_app]`; `rw`/`simp only [Hom.comp_app]` MISS. Same
  for `restrictAdjunction_unit/counit_app_app`, `pushforward_map_app`.
- **Merge at MAP level, never force the carrier.** `ŌåÉ M.presheaf.map_comp` composes `OpensßĄÆßĄ¢`
  morphisms before the functor; closes by thin-poset `Subsingleton.elim`. Closing `rfl` is
  heartbeat-flaky through the diamond ŌåÆ `all_goals first | rfl | (congr 1; exact Subsingleton.elim _ _)`
  is the robust finish; `set_option linter.{unusedTactic,unreachableTactic} false` silences the dead branch.

## Cost of the close ŌĆö terminal name-collision RED (iter-049 must-fix, trivial)
The iter-046 scaffold left a `private lemma conjugateEquiv_restrictFunctorComp_inv` (body `sorry`) in
`TensorObjInverse.lean` L216, **same FQ name** (both files are in `namespace AlgebraicGeometry.Scheme.Modules`).
Now that the root version is public + imported, Lean rejects the private duplicate:
`error: a non-private declaration 'AlgebraicGeometry.Scheme.Modules.conjugateEquiv_restrictFunctorComp_inv'
has already been declared` ŌåÆ terminal RED. **`private` does NOT name-mangle this away across import.**
Fix: delete the stub (L207ŌĆō259, docstring + lemma + sorry + stale comment) and `exact` the root lemma.
Restores terminal to 7 sorries green-mod-sorry and unblocks B2 + B1-crux (conjugate-distribution recipe
`analogies/b2mate045.md`). Pre-flagged by the prover's own task_result.

## Attempt trace (from attempts_raw.jsonl ŌĆö root-file work)
The prover's captured edits show iterative refinement of the residual finish (not the headline route,
which was found quickly): (1) initial scaffold doc-comment + `ext U : 1; sorry`; (2)
`simp only [Hom.comp_app, pushforward_map_app, ŌĆ”]; erw [restrictAdjunction_unit_app_app,
restrictAdjunction_counit_app_app]; sorry`; (3) added `rw [Hom.comp_app]; sorry`; (4) reverted that
`rw`; (5) finalized with the `leftAdjointCompIso` head-rewrite + map-level merge. builds:0 captured
(prover verified via isolated `lake env lean`/LSP during the run; the authoritative EXIT-0 build was
re-run this review). total_errors:7 in trace = intermediate goal-state probes, all resolved.

## Reviewer audits
- lean-auditor (iter048): 2 must-fix (collision build error L216 ŌĆö CONFIRMED by my lake build; false
  "IRREDUCIBLE" stub comment L235ŌĆō245 ŌĆö both fixed by one stub deletion), 4 major (stale root header
  L46 "lhs_tmul sole sorry"; etc.), 5 minor. New root decls genuine + axiom-clean. Report:
  `.archon/task_results/lean-auditor-iter048.md`.
- lean-vs-blueprint-checker (substrate048): PASS ŌĆö keystone faithful, signature verbatim, sorry-free,
  axiom-clean, `\leanok` correct. Minor: `\uses` omits the two abstract Mathlib lemmas (planner adds);
  `restrictFunctor_map_app'` is lean_aux (no block). Report:
  `.archon/task_results/lean-vs-blueprint-checker-substrate-iter048.md`.

## Blueprint markers updated (manual)
- `Picard_TensorObjSubstrate.tex`, `lem:conjugate_equiv_restrictfunctorcomp_inv`: added `\leanok`
  (statement + proof). **Manual override justified:** sync_leanok withheld it (ŌłÆ27/+0 this iter) because
  the FQ-name collision makes the analyzer resolve `\lean{}` to the terminal sorry-stub; the *root* decl
  is genuinely proved + axiom-clean (independently verified ŌĆö `lake build` EXIT 0, `#print axioms` no
  sorryAx). The lemma IS formalized and closed.
- `Picard_TensorObjSubstrate.tex`, B2 proof block (`lem:restrictfunctorisopullback_comp_compat`):
  replaced the stale iter-046 `% NOTE:` ("irreducible to library algebra / OUT OF SCOPE", now false)
  with an iter-048 CLOSED note describing the abstract route.
- `Picard_TensorObjSubstrate.tex`, keystone proof block: added an iter-048 `% NOTE:` flagging that the
  Lean proof routes through `leftAdjointCompIso` + `conjugateEquiv_leftAdjointCompIso_inv` first, and
  recommending the planner add those two Mathlib lemmas to the block's `\uses`.

## Notes (LOW)
- `dag-query`: gaps=0 (no Ōł× holes), unmatched=106 (the new private `restrictFunctor_map_app'` joins the
  long-standing categorical-plumbing coverage debt; deferred to scheduled cleanup).
- blueprint-doctor: clean.

## Recommendations for next session
See `recommendations.md`. Top item: delete the terminal stub (restores build), then close B2 + B1-crux.
